node.data: {"M36":{"lit":"սատակեցին","context":"text/body/ab[5]","n":"սատակեցին"},"M8076":{"lit":"սատակեցին","context":"text/body/ab[4]","n":"սատակեցին"},"M3237":{"lit":"սատակեցին","line":{"facs":"#z104359962","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104359962","n":"4"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3237-095a"},"n":"սատակեցին"},"M7085":{"lit":"սատակեցին","line":{"facs":"#z104150766","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104150766","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"7085-009a"},"n":"սատակեցին"},"V31":{"lit":"սատակեցին","line":{"facs":"#z104331198","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104331198","n":"17"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_132551 copy"},"n":"սատակեցին"},"M3119":{"lit":"սատ<lb xml:id=\"l104267005\" facs=\"#z104267005\" n=\"7\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ակեցին","line":{"facs":"#z104267004","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104267004","n":"6"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"3119-129a"},"n":"սատակեցին"},"M8699":{"lit":"սատա<lb xml:id=\"l103950489\" facs=\"#z103950489\" n=\"21\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>կեցին","line":{"facs":"#z103950488","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103950488","n":"20"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-154b"},"n":"սատակեցին"}}
